delay_driver: Policy interpretation uncertainty between national and local requirements
notes: Developers spend 2-6 weeks seeking pre-app clarity that should be resolvable from policy alone

delay_driver: NSIP track determination and pre-app consultation scoping
notes: NSIP pre-app process adds 12-24 months before submission; even smaller schemes face full requirements

delay_driver: Inconsistent LPA validation checklists causing invalid notices and resubmission
notes: Estimated 10-15% of submissions returned; each resubmission adds 2-4 weeks minimum

delay_driver: EIA screening and scoping disputes delaying formal submission
notes: EIA scoping requests average 5 weeks to resolve; screening opinions average 3 weeks

delay_driver: Statutory consultee non-response or late response
notes: Estimated 30-40% of consultations extended beyond 21 days; each extension adds 2-6 weeks

delay_driver: Duplicate EIA and HRA evidence requests from separate consultee regimes
notes: Overlapping ecological survey requirements double applicant cost and extend pre-determination period

delay_driver: Policy-weight disputes leading to referral or deferral
notes: Ambiguity on tilted balance and transitional policy leads to committee deferrals and officer report rewrites

delay_driver: Transport assessment scope disputes requiring late amendment
notes: Highway authority scope disagreements surface at committee stage after consultation has closed
Median s106 completion delay 9-18 months; no statutory backstop on negotiation duration
Viability renegotiation on allocated sites adds 6-18 months and reduces affordable housing delivery

delay_driver: No statutory determination period for condition discharge applications
notes: Condition discharge routinely takes 3-12 months; post-permission holding costs block site start

delay_driver: Complex pre-commencement conditions on NSIP consents requiring multiple approvals
notes: NSIP consents carry extensive pre-commencement requirements; discharge co-ordination lacking
